what_the_literature_provides: Load scale, size dependence, failure-initiation context and single-particle fragment-mode targets.
remaining_gap: Single-particle tests do not identify the first damaged parent particle inside a load-bearing random bed.
manuscript_role: Calibrates the bonded template before bed insertion.
claim_boundary: Sensitivity-bounded template representation, not a final Li4SiO4 material law.

what_the_literature_provides: Bed stiffness, compaction, crush-probability, breakage-ratio, pressure-drop and packing-structure trends.
remaining_gap: Bed-level responses do not resolve the chronological source of the first localized internal damage.
manuscript_role: Converts compression response into parent-particle event sequences.
claim_boundary: Finite 100-parent-particle event windows with two 200-parent-particle intact scale/strength endpoints.

what_the_literature_provides: Coordination number, contact-force distribution and load-path evolution in particulate beds.
remaining_gap: Force-chain descriptors are rarely linked to internal bond-loss increments of named parent particles.
manuscript_role: Links localized fracture events to native force-network state variables.
claim_boundary: State-space separation in the current finite windows, not a universal classifier.

what_the_literature_provides: Efficient bed-scale particle replacement, fragment insertion and crushed-fraction effects.
remaining_gap: Replacement routes usually begin after an overload criterion and do not preserve a pre-loaded internal bond graph for every parent particle.
manuscript_role: Introduces intact bonded-template insertion before fracture loading.
claim_boundary: Workflow evidence for accepted windows and the completed 200-parent-particle intact scale/strength endpoints.

what_the_literature_provides: A subparticle-bond representation that can resolve internal crack growth and fragment topology.
remaining_gap: The single-object bonded-particle idea needs a bed insertion and event-extraction route for many parent particles.
manuscript_role: Extends bonded-particle fracture resolution to packed parent-particle event chronology.
claim_boundary: Event chronology and material-response evidence in finite bed windows.
